---
title: "SpaceApps Challenge"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Innovating for space exploration and Earth observation"
description: "The SpaceApps Challenge is our premier space-focused hackathon where participants develop innovative solutions for space exploration, satellite technology, and Earth observation."
page-layout: custom
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
image: "/assets/images/sac.jpg"
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:65vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy Hackathon</div>
    <h1>SpaceApps<br>Challenge</h1>
    <p>A two-day hackathon dedicated to space innovation, satellite tech, and Earth observation.</p>
    <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">2025 Edition</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">9</div><div class="m-nl">Editions</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">100+</div><div class="m-nl">Participants</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">48h</div><div class="m-nl">Hackathon</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">2</div><div class="m-nl">Countries</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="SpaceApps teams"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Innovation meets<br>space science.</h2>
        <p>Each year, participants form teams to tackle challenges across multiple tracks — from Earth observation and climate monitoring to space habitat design and satellite communications. Work with real space data, connect with industry experts, and potentially launch projects that contribute to future space missions.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" class="m-lk">2025 edition details</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Challenge tracks</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four domains, one mission: innovate for space.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-3"><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Earth Observation"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Earth Observation</h3><p>Climate monitoring, satellite data, and environmental analysis.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-3"><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Space Habitat"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Space Habitat</h3><p>Life support systems, habitat design, and sustainability.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-3"><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Satellite Comms"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Satellite & IoT</h3><p>Communications, data relay, and connected devices.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-3"><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Space Resources"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Space Resources</h3><p>Manufacturing, mining, and resource utilization.</p></div></div></a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Why participate</h2>
    <p class="sub">Build, learn, and launch — in 48 hours.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i><h3>Innovation</h3><p>Contribute to cutting-edge space technology and potentially shape the future of exploration.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Collaboration</h3><p>Work with diverse teams and receive guidance from mentors in space tech and related fields.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-trophy"></i><h3>Opportunity</h3><p>Win prizes, gain recognition, and secure support for further development of your project.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Get involved</h2>
    <p class="sub">Three ways to be part of SpaceApps.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Participate"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Participate</h3><p>Join as a participant and develop innovative space solutions with your team.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/contact.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Mentor"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Mentor</h3><p>Share your expertise and guide participants through technical challenges.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/contact.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Sponsor"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Sponsor</h3><p>Support space innovation by sponsoring the event or providing resources.</p></div></div></a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>SpaceApps Challenge</h2>
    <p>Questions about the hackathon? Get in touch or register for the next edition.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">2025 Edition</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Contact us</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
